commit_message: feat: implement collapsible enterprise bottom bar for robust navigation

files.content: // Add isBottomBarOpen state and toggleBottomBar action with persist middleware.
// Implement framer-motion for slide up/down. Include Back, Home, Menu buttons, and a collapse/expand toggle. Handle safe-area-inset-bottom.
// Remove old Orb. Inject <CollapsibleBottomBar />. Add dynamic padding-bottom to <main> based on isBottomBarOpen. Hide on /cashier route.

testing_requirements: Verifikasi animasi buka/tutup berjalan mulus. Pastikan tombol kembali tidak error di halaman Home. Pastikan konten paling bawah halaman tidak tertutup bar.
